current_plan.description: Build topical authority in AI × Finance Operations through twice-daily publishing targeting high-intent finance executives; baseline metrics pending GA4/GSC instrumentation fix.
long_tail_keywords: how AI is changing investment banking 2026
current_plan.rationale: The strategy launched 2026-03-22, making it only 1 day old — well within the 5-day minimum evaluation window. GA4 and GSC data are unavailable due to a misconfigured IAM credentials API (503/403 errors), so no performance data can be assessed. Google Trends also returned a 404. Tavily confirms strong competitor activity in AI-in-finance content, validating the chosen pillar. Strategy must be held until instrumentation is restored and real data flows.

decision_history.rationale: Output parse failed — keeping existing strategy unchanged.
decision_history.plan_summary: Initial strategy — establish content presence and baseline organic metrics
